title: T2 Corporate Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## T2 Corporate Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) Statistics
The T2 Corporate SR&ED statistical tables provide key SR&ED tax and accounting information for all T2 returns that were assessed or reassessed.
- 2023 Edition (2015 to 2021 tax years)
- 2022 Edition (2014 to 2020 tax years)
- 2021 Edition (2013 to 2019 tax years)
- 2020 Edition (2012 to 2018 tax years)
- 2019 Edition (2011 to 2015 tax years)
- 2018 Edition (2010 to 2014 tax years)
- 2017 Edition (2000 to 2013 tax years)
